questions.question: A musician is tuning her guitar. If she tightens a string to $3 \cdot x$ Hz and then loosens it to $2 \cdot x + 5$ Hz, what is $x$ if the resulting frequency equals $11$ Hz?
An artist is mixing paint on a $12 \cdot x$ by $15 \cdot x$ cm canvas. If the area of the canvas is $1800$ square cm, what is $x$?
A DJ is creating a rhythm pattern with a $2 \cdot x + 1$ beat intro, followed by a $5 \cdot x - 3$ beat verse. If the total duration is $23$ beats, what is $x$?
A sound engineer is adjusting the frequency of a speaker to $x - 2$ Hz. If the new frequency is $5$ Hz higher than the original $8$ Hz, what is $x$?
A music producer is creating a song with a tempo of $120 + 2 \cdot x$ beats per minute. If the tempo increases by $10$ beats per minute, what is $x$?
An art gallery has a painting with a frame that is $2 \cdot x$ cm wide and $3 \cdot x$ cm tall. If the frame's area is $96$ square cm, what is $x$?
A drummer is playing a rhythm with $x + 2$ beats in the intro and $2 \cdot x - 1$ beats in the verse. If the total number of beats is $15$, what is $x$?
A sound wave has a frequency of $x - 3$ Hz. If the frequency increases by $2$ Hz, what is $x$ if the new frequency is $7$ Hz?
Solve the equation $2 \cdot x + 5 = 11$ and check your solution for accuracy. Show all work.
A painter is creating a mural on a $10 \cdot x$ by $8 \cdot x$ foot wall. If the area of the wall is $480$ square feet, solve for $x$ and check your solution. Show all work.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Ensure students show all work for FRQs
Tip 2: Encourage students to check their solutions for accuracy
Tip 3: Remind students to use proper mathematical notation
